CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

PHILLIP F. SHINN, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CHARTER MILLION ENTERPRISES, LTD who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant SOMA NETWORKS, INC.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CHARTER MILLION ENTERPRISES, and against the Defaulted Defendant SOMA NETWORKS, INC as follows:

DAMAGES: $280,000.00 IN HONG KONG DOLLARS, PLUS INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10%; COSTS OF $607.50 IN US DOLLARS; ATTY'S FEES OF $12,578. IN US DOLLARS; INTEREST $3609.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
